case_title: TELLO, JUAN VS HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD.,INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD.,INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY TELLO, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD.,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL SENT TO ESC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD, INC RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TELLO, JUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD.,INC. $161.08 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $193.08, PER THE LIMITED WARRANTY SECTION #4 IN THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, SIGNED BY PLAINTIFF ON 1/23/03, THE DEFENDANT SHALL EITHER: ALTER THE STYLE OF PLAINTIFF'S "NEW HAIR" OR MAKE PLAINTIFF A NEW "HEAD OF HAIR" OF THE SAME TYPE AT NO CHARGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27871, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CORRECTED NOTICE OF FILING NOTICE OF APPEAL SENT TO ALL PARTIES; APPEAL FILED BY PLTF: TELLO, JUAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TELLO, JUAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD.,INC. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27871 ON 6/1/05. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
